name: Hubei Huarong Holding Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hubei Huarong Holding Co.,Ltd. produces and distributes pharmaceutical products in China. The company's principal pharmaceutical products include Gucining Capsules and Huoxue Tongmai Capsules. It also develops biological products, pharmaceuticals, environment-protection, and agricultural products, as well as related technologies. The company was formerly known as Hubei Yangfan Holding Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hubei Huarong Holding Co.,Ltd. in November 2020. Hubei Huarong Holding Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Wuhan, China.
